scripts.dev: node scripts/dev_env.js && npm run type-check && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n h5,mp,server "cross-env NODE_ENV=development UNI_INPUT_DIR=app/src VITE_ROOT_DIR=app node node_modules/@dcloudio/vite-plugin-uni/bin/uni.js build --watch --mode development --config app/vite.config.ts" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development UNI_INPUT_DIR=app/src VITE_ROOT_DIR=app node node_modules/@dcloudio/vite-plugin-uni/bin/uni.js build -p mp-weixin --watch --mode development --config app/vite.config.ts" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development tsx server/src/server.ts"
scripts.dev:h5: node scripts/dev_env.js && npm run type-check && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n h5,server "cross-env NODE_ENV=development UNI_INPUT_DIR=app/src VITE_ROOT_DIR=app node node_modules/@dcloudio/vite-plugin-uni/bin/uni.js --mode development --config app/vite.config.ts" "cross-env NODE_ENV=development tsx server/src/server.ts"
scripts.build:app:h5: cross-env NODE_ENV=production UNI_INPUT_DIR=app/src VITE_ROOT_DIR=app node node_modules/@dcloudio/vite-plugin-uni/bin/uni.js build --mode production --config app/vite.config.ts
scripts.build:app:mp: cross-env NODE_ENV=production UNI_INPUT_DIR=app/src VITE_ROOT_DIR=app node node_modules/@dcloudio/vite-plugin-uni/bin/uni.js build -p mp-weixin --mode production --config app/vite.config.ts
scripts.build:app: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n h5,mp "npm run build:app:h5" "npm run build:app:mp"
scripts.build: npm run type-check && npm run build:app && npm run build:server
scripts.build:h5: npm run type-check && npm run build:app:h5 && npm run build:server
scripts.quality:build:h5: npm run build:app:h5 && npm run build:server
